papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks. We propose the Transformer, a model architecture based solely on attention mechanisms.

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce BERT, a new language representation model designed to pre-train deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text.

papers.title: A Survey on Information Extraction
papers.abstract: We survey recent advances in information extraction, covering named entity recognition, relation extraction, and event detection.

papers.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
papers.abstract: We show that scaling language models greatly improves task-agnostic, few-shot performance.
